slides.title: Hi, I'm Arty
slides.desc: Your personal AI assistant. Ask me anything — I'm here to help.

slides.title: Talk to me any way you like
slides.desc: By text, photo, voice or by scanning a document. I adapt to you.

slides.title: Connect your tools
slides.desc: Connect your Google account for your identity and calendar. For anything else, attach or share the content directly with Arty.

slides.title: Customize the answers
slides.desc: Change the tone (concise, detailed, formal…) and the AI model (Claude, Mistral, Gemini) anytime from the top of the screen. Tap ? to learn more.

profileSetup.subtitle: Just enough to personalise our chats. Stays on this device.

home.title: How can I help you?
home.hintHelp: Type <0>/help</0> to see everything I can do

discover.label: Discover
discover.description: A summary of everything I can do, with examples.
discover.prompt: Give me a clear, concise summary of everything you can do, organised by area (my calendar, content I attach, writing text and emails, searching and summarising information from the web, analysing documents and images). For each area, give 1-2 concrete example sentences I could write to you. Keep it concise and welcoming.

suggestions.title: Suggestions
suggestions.calendarToday: What do I have scheduled today?
suggestions.calendarWeek: Show my calendar for the week

googleReconsent.title: Reconnect Google for your calendar
googleReconsent.body: Arty now asks only for access to your events instead of full access to your calendar. Reconnect your account to keep viewing and creating events. Your Arty session and conversations stay intact.

editorial.subtitle: Your studio is ready. Pick up the thread or open a blank page.
editorial.discoverDescription: New: professional templates write your reports in your own house style.
editorial.calendarDisconnected: No calendar is connected. Connect Google to display today’s events.

prepare.title: Prepare
prepare.subtitle: an agenda
prepare.prompt: Prepare a concise agenda for my next meeting. Start by asking for any information you need.

structure.title: Structure

structure.prompt: Help me turn my ideas into a clear outline. First ask me to paste my notes.

analyze.title: Analyze
analyze.subtitle: the risks
analyze.prompt: Analyze the risks of my project with nuance. First ask for its context, constraints and deadline.

imagine.title: Imagine

imagine.prompt: Suggest new angles for my topic. First ask for the objective, audience and ideas already explored.

suggestions.translatePrompt: Translate this content and ask for the target language:

upgradeModal.title: {{model}} is Pro-only
upgradeModal.body: On the free plan you get access to <0>Claude Haiku (10/day)</0> and <1>Mistral (5/day)</1>. To unlock Sonnet, Opus, Gemini and GPT, upgrade to Pro.
upgradeModal.bodyNative: On the free plan you get access to <0>Claude Haiku (10/day)</0> and <1>Mistral (5/day)</1>. To unlock Sonnet, Opus, Gemini and GPT, use your own API key (BYOK).

optionsSheet.title: This conversation

modelDesc.mistral: Data processed in Europe — private content, files, clients
modelDesc.openai: Manual selection — or auto when you mention ChatGPT with your OpenAI key

optionsSheet.euNote: This conversation contains EU data (Mistral). Picking a 🇺🇸 model will ask for confirmation before sending its content outside Europe.
optionsSheet.euLocked: Europe-locked conversation — Mistral only, voice dictation included (Voxtral 🇫🇷) · fact-check disabled (it would leave Europe)

modelExplain.mistral: Mistral runs in Europe mode (servers in France) — ideal for private content supplied in chat, files and client information. No web search or link opening.
modelExplain.gemini: Gemini handles real-time web search, news questions and Google Maps queries. Data processed outside Europe.
modelExplain.haiku: Claude Haiku handles quick, short conversations — no monthly cap on paid plans (the free plan is limited to 10/day).
modelExplain.opus: Claude Opus handles deep analysis, complex tasks and multi-step reasoning. Pro model.
modelExplain.claude: Claude is the default for attached files, private content supplied in chat, URLs to open, or requests needing Drive and Calendar tools. Data is processed in the United States (Anthropic).
modelExplain.openai: GPT (OpenAI) is used when you select it manually — or automatically if you've set up your OpenAI key and your message mentions ChatGPT/GPT. Data processed outside Europe.
modelExplain.fallback: Model picked automatically based on your request.

routeReason.eu_only: Europe-mode conversation: Mistral (servers in France) is the only model used — your data never leaves Europe.
routeReason.files_to_claude: The selected model cannot handle this file in Arty, so Claude is used to analyze it.
routeReason.files_mistral_native: Image attached with Mistral selected: Mistral analyzes it with its native vision (data stays in Europe).
routeReason.private_data: Your request contains private content supplied in chat, a file or calendar data, so Claude handles it without an unnecessary web search.
routeReason.youtube_native: YouTube link detected: Gemini watches the video directly.
routeReason.url_web_fetch: Link detected: Claude actually opens and reads the page (other models only see snippets and may make things up).
routeReason.openai_intent: You mentioned ChatGPT/GPT: your request was sent to it.
routeReason.hybrid_research: Report or comparison: Gemini does the web research, then Claude writes the synthesis.
routeReason.trivial_chat: Short message: fast path, no unnecessary web search.
routeReason.default_capable: General question: Gemini answers with Google Search (up-to-date info).
routeReason.fallback_no_provider: The ideal model isn't available on this account: falling back to the best accessible one.
routeReason.plan_locked_haiku: Free or trial account without credits: Claude Haiku is the included model.
routeReason.submodel_haiku_trivial: Short message: Claude Haiku is enough (fast and light).
routeReason.submodel_opus_report: Strategic report: Claude Opus, the most powerful model, steps in.
routeReason.submodel_sonnet_default: Claude Sonnet, the best power/speed balance.
routeReason.server_model_substitution: The server applied the Claude model available for your account.

override.eu_only: Europe-mode conversation → switched to Mistral instead of {{requested}} so the data stays in Europe.
override.files_to_claude: File attached → Claude handles it because the selected model cannot process this file, instead of {{requested}}.
override.private_data: Private data detected → answer handled by Claude instead of {{requested}}.
override.fallback_no_provider: {{requested}} is not available for this account → switched to Claude before sending.

factCheck.unavailableDetail: The factual check could not complete (timeout, overload or network). The answer above has NOT been verified — read it with a critical eye.
factCheck.notAppliedHint: The response could not be corrected automatically — the quoted passage no longer appears verbatim. Rely on the value above.

proactiveBrief.title: Your brief
proactiveBrief.empty: Add your first task or connect a source to create your brief.
proactiveBrief.calm: Nothing urgent in your calendar, tasks or memory. Have a great day!
proactiveBrief.systemPrompt: You are Arty preparing a short brief from the user's calendar, Arty tasks and local memory. You only have the read-only list_calendar tool and must not perform any write action. Find what matters today and tomorrow, then call present_brief exactly once with items sorted by priority. For each item, provide a short title, optional detail, source and a reminder or schedule action when relevant. Write no text outside the present_brief call. Write titles and details in English.
proactiveBrief.prompt: Prepare today's brief from my calendar, tasks and memory, then suggest relevant actions. Return the result through the present_brief tool.

customInstructions.title: Custom instructions
customInstructions.description: Tell Arty how to talk to you and what it should always know. Applied to every model, with priority. Stays encrypted on your device.
customInstructions.placeholder: E.g. I'm a mechanic in Lyon. Answer directly, no jargon. Be formal with me.

costsScreen.heroSubtitle: Local tracking of AI usage, based on real tokens.
costsScreen.sourceNote: Source: real tokens captured server-side (table `quota_model`), local history fallback when offline. Exact accuracy vs. official invoice.
costsScreen.alertDescription: Banner on next launch when the current month exceeds the threshold.
costsScreen.exportColumns: Columns: date, model, tokens_input, tokens_output, cost_eur
costsScreen.empty: Start chatting to see your costs here 💬

hero.lede: Arty brings Claude, GPT-5, Gemini and Mistral together in one personal assistant, with your Google calendar and the content you choose to share with it.

problem.title: How much are your AI subscriptions costing you?
problem.p1: ChatGPT Plus, Claude Pro, Gemini… stacking them costs €60–80 a month, for opaque limits and three interfaces that don't talk to each other.
problem.p2: Arty replaces them with a single assistant: you pick the model for the task, you see your limits in plain words, and you pay a final price you know upfront.

models.title: The right model for each task
models.text: Claude for writing, Gemini for research, Mistral for confidential work: Arty routes your request to the right model — or you pick it yourself.

calendar.title: Your calendar, connected
calendar.text: Connect your Google calendar: "Schedule a meeting tomorrow at 2pm" creates the event. Check, create, move — in plain language.

files.title: Your documents, on your terms
files.text: Paste, attach or share a PDF, an image, a text: Arty reads them natively. Nothing is siphoned in the background — you choose what you hand over.

voice.title: Voice or keyboard
voice.text: Dictate your messages and listen to the replies. Handy on the go, on mobile and on the web.

limits.title: Readable limits
limits.text: Your quotas are shown in messages, with visible counters in the app — not in "credits" or "points".

noSwitch.title: Never a silent downgrade
noSwitch.text: Quota reached? Arty tells you and lets you choose — it never quietly moves you to a weaker model.

privacy.title: Your data stays yours
privacy.text: Conversations encrypted on your device (AES-256). And for sensitive work, a 100% European confidential mode (Mistral, servers in France), switchable per conversation.

byok.title: Your own key if you prefer
byok.text: You can plug in your own API key (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Mistral) and pay cost price. Your spending is tracked model by model.

pricing.title: Three ways to use Arty.
pricing.trialCallout: 🎁 Start with the free trial: 30 messages, no credit card.
pricing.byokDesc: Your own API key · All models · Encrypted local storage
pricing.subDesc: No API key · 150 Claude Sonnet/Opus + 100 GPT-5 per month · Haiku, Flash and Mistral with no monthly cap
pricing.subReassurance: ✓ Cancel in one click, anytime — pause available. No commitment.
pricing.proDesc: One-time payment, app for life · You use your own API key (BYOK) · Business templates · Priority support
pricing.extras: Need more? +100 premium messages pack at €1.99 VAT incl., or prepaid credits (€10 = 1,000 credits) that never expire.
pricing.transparency: Our limits are stated in plain messages — no “credits” or “points”. The price shown is the final price, VAT included. A daily anti-abuse limit applies to all plans.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: With the subscription: 150 Claude Sonnet/Opus messages and 100 GPT-5 per month, plus Haiku, Flash and Mistral with no monthly cap. The free trial (30 messages) uses the base models (Haiku, Flash, Mistral Medium).
faq.q2: Can I use my own API key?
faq.a2: Yes. BYOK mode is free on Arty's side: plug in your Anthropic, OpenAI, Google or Mistral key, access every model and pay your provider at cost price. Your key is encrypted locally and never leaves your device in the clear.
faq.q3: What's the difference between the Subscription and Pro?
faq.a3: The Subscription (€9.99/mo VAT incl.) works without an API key: Arty provides model access, with quotas stated in plain words. Pro (€39 one-time) is a lifetime license for the app where you use your own API key — model access goes through your key, not Arty's servers.
faq.q4: What happens when I reach my quota?
faq.a4: Nothing silent: Arty tells you and lets you choose — add a 100 premium messages pack (€1.99), continue on the models with no monthly cap, or wait for next month.
faq.a5: Your conversations are encrypted on your device (AES-256). Claude, GPT-5 and Gemini process requests in the United States (covered by Standard Contractual Clauses and the EU-US DPF); for sensitive work, the confidential mode routes everything to Mistral, on servers in France.
faq.q6: Does Arty replace ChatGPT Plus or Claude Pro?
faq.a6: Arty is a personal assistant that brings several AIs into one app, with your calendar and your content. If you stack several subscriptions today, one may be enough — and if another model is stronger for your task, you switch in one tap without losing the thread.
faq.a7: Florent Pollet, solo founder, in France. When you write to support, he's the one who answers.

footer.madeIn: Built in France by Florent Pollet, solo founder.

upgrade.heroSubtitle: No commitment. You can change later.
upgrade.legal: Secure payment through the merchant shown at checkout. VAT included.
upgrade.statusPendingBody: Confirmation can take a minute. Check back in a moment.
upgrade.errorNoToken: Sign in with Google to check your subscription.
upgrade.errorNoEmail: No email found. Sign in with Google first.
upgrade.byokDescription: Your own API key · All models · Local storage
upgrade.proDescription: One-time payment, app for life · You use your own API key (BYOK) · Business templates · Priority support · No subscription
upgrade.subscriptionDescription: No API key · 150 Claude Sonnet/Opus + 100 GPT-5 per month · Haiku, Flash and Mistral with no monthly cap
upgrade.premiumPackDescription: For Subscription users who have reached their monthly quota.
upgrade.creditsTagline: Pay as you go · No subscription
upgrade.creditsDescription: Top up once, spend across every model. No monthly commitment — credits don't expire.
upgrade.creditsError: Couldn't start the checkout. Please try again.
upgrade.creditsAdded: Credits added — your balance is up to date.
upgrade.transparency: Our limits are stated in plain messages — no “credits” or “points”. The price shown is the final price, VAT included. A daily anti-abuse limit applies to all plans.
upgrade.nativeUnavailableTitle: Plans not available in this version
upgrade.nativeUnavailableBody: In the Android app you can use your own API key (BYOK) — free on Arty's side, you pay your provider directly. If you already have a subscription, just sign in: it's recognized automatically.
upgrade.subscriptionReassurance: ✓ Cancel in one click, anytime — pause available. No commitment.
upgrade.whyIntro: No magic — just an economic model we own up to:
upgrade.whyRouting: Smart routing: each question goes to the model that's just good enough, not always the priciest one. Less compute paid = cheaper for you.
upgrade.whyMargin: Low margin, on purpose: a small markup over the real cost, not a 3x price like elsewhere.
upgrade.whyTransparency: Limits stated in plain messages (not opaque “credits”) and the final price shown, VAT included.
upgrade.whyByok: And you can always plug in your own API key (BYOK) to pay cost price.
upgrade.trialCallout: 🎁 New here? Try it free first: 30 messages, no credit card.

account.deleteDescription: Permanently erases your content, sessions, and reports — on this device and our servers.
